channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: TSLA Stock On Track For Worst Week In A Year On Fresh Roadster Delay As Musk’s April Promise Fades
item.description: Tesla has reportedly postponed its planned public demo for its next-generation Roadster to August or later.

item.title: Tesla Gets 227.6% Target Boost As JPMorgan Upgrades Rating
item.description: JPMorgan lifts Tesla to Neutral, citing vertical integration and long-term growth from autonomy, robotics and newer services.

item.title: 'Borderline dishonest': Analysts shred SpaceX's IPO filing, ringing alarm bells on its $1.77 trillion valuation
item.description: Not all of Wall Street is buying Musk’s math.

item.title: Prediction: Tesla Stock Will Hit $500 on This Date
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) sits in an awkward place. Q1 2026 showed automotive gross margin rebounding to 21.1% from 16.2% a year earlier, FSD subscriptions hit 1.28 million (+51% YoY), and free cash flow more than doubled to $1.444 billion. Yet shares closed at $418.45, down 6.95% YTD.

item.title: Ferrari CEO’s self-driving stance echoes Elon Musk’s — sort of
item.description: Ferrari CEO Benedetto Vigna revealed that the Italian automaker’s future will not involve self-driving, a point that echoes that of Tesla CEO Elon Musk’s — sort of. You might be thinking, “Are you insane? Musk has been so incredibly hellbent on delivering self-driving vehicles to the public, so m...

item.title: Elon Musk’s $1.8 Trillion SpaceX IPO Is Too Big to Succeed
item.description: The SpaceX initial public offering is one of a kind; the investment opportunity is not. SpaceX’s IPO is arguably the biggest capital-markets event ever, and unique. SpaceX’s singularity will continue when it starts trading, with the company added to the just 15 trading days after the offering,...

item.title: Broadcom, Quantinuum, Strategy, Tesla, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
item.description: Investors are slamming the brakes on the AI rally, dragging down shares in Broadcom, Micron, and Nvidia.

item.title: Tesla Turned $1,000 Into This Much The Past 10 Years
item.description: From Near-Bankruptcy to the AI and Autonomy Bet Ten years ago, Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) was a Model S and Model X maker scrambling to ramp the Model 3 and absorb SolarCity. The decade since has packed in production hell, a brush with insolvency, S&P 500 inclusion in late 2020, a euphoric run past a $1...

item.title: Can AI and Robotics Revive Tesla? ETFs Worth Considering
item.description: A renewed focus on AI and robotics is reshaping Tesla's investment story. Here are a few Tesla-heavy ETFs that are worth considering.

item.title: How skeptical should investors be of these mega-IPOs?
item.description: As markets (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) prepare for the public launch of SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) on June 12, should investors be skeptical of these mega-IPOs expected to sweep Wall Street? 9i Capital Group founder and CEO Kevin Thompson cites the circular investing occurring between Big Tech names and these pr...

item.title: Tesla upgrades Model Y’s affordable trims with new interior features
item.description: Tesla has upgraded the Model Y’s two most affordable trims, the Rear-Wheel-Drive and All-Wheel-Drive, with two new interior features that bring them level with their “Premium” siblings. The Rear-Wheel-Drive (RWD) and All-Wheel-Drive (AWD) trims, formerly known as the “Standard” offerings of Tesla...

item.title: Lemonade Tests Tesla Usage Based Auto Cover As Losses Remain A Focus
item.description: Lemonade (NYSE:LMND) introduced autonomous car insurance for Tesla owners in Indiana. The product is tailored to Tesla drivers using Full Self Driving technology. Pricing is usage based, with potential cost savings tied to how often Full Self Driving is used.

item.title: Ripple (XRP) Slides 6% as Crypto Risks Becoming a “First Casualty” of the SpaceX IPO
item.description: Ripple (CRYPTO:XRP) is taking a hit on Friday, June 5. The cryptocurrency is down 6% to $1.103, extending a multi-day slide that has dragged the broader digital asset complex into the red. Bitcoin (CRYPTO:BTC) and Ethereum (CRYPTO:ETH) are also down, but the XRP move stands out given the token’s ...

item.title: How Seriously Should Investors Take SpaceX's AI Narrative?
item.description: SpaceX lands rockets on drone ships, launches more payload to orbit than every other company combined, and runs the world's largest satellite internet network.

item.title: Tesla Uniquely Positioned to Scale Emerging AI Markets, J.P. Morgan Says
item.description: Tesla's (TSLA) competitive edge of deep vertical integration across hardware and software, coupled w

item.title: Musk Just Spoke to SpaceX Investors. $3.4 Trillion in Sales and 5 More Things to Know.
item.description: SpaceX details are coming out ahead of its expected IPO. Trading in the space stock should start June 12.

item.title: Elon Musk poised to be world's first trillionaire
item.description: Elon Musk is poised to become the world's first trillionaire when SpaceX stock debuts next week, with the company's target IPO price valuing his stake at a considerable $866.5 billion on paper.

item.title: JP Morgan upgrades Tesla to neutral, raises price target to $475
item.description: The bank's new analyst shifted focus to Tesla's robotics and autonomous driving potential, away from its slowing EV business

item.title: SpaceX’s IPO is Set to Make Elon Musk a Trillionaire. Here’s 4 Key Figures That Will Become Billionaires.
item.description: It’s big news as the buzz gets louder surrounding the most publicized IPO in years. CNBC reporter Robert Frank reported on June 5 that SpaceX’s IPO is set to price next Friday, June 12, at $135 per share. The deal would potentially lift Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) CEO Elon Musk’s net worth past $1 trilli...

item.title: Xpeng spends $500M/year on AI training to beat Tesla FSD
item.description: Xpeng’s head of autonomous driving told Electrek that the company is spending roughly 300 million RMB (~$41 million) per month on AI training alone and believes it has already reached parity with Tesla’s FSD v13 — with v14 within reach before the end of summer. I sat down with Dr. Xianming Liu, h...

item.title: Don't expect to see SpaceX on the S&P 500 so soon after IPO
item.description: S&P Dow Jones Indices stated that it will not be changing its rules to fast-track SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) and other mega-IPOs into the S&P 500 index (^GSPC). Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman and Vanity Fair contributing editor Bethany McLean discuss SpaceX's valuation in the lead up to the space company'...

item.title: Tesla Stock Has One Less Sell Rating. J.P. Morgan Raises Its Price Target by 228%.
item.description: Tesla stock has one less Sell rating. J.P. Morgan analyst Rajat Gupta on Friday upgraded Tesla to Hold from Sell.

item.title: Elon Musk Spoke To SpaceX Investors. Here’s What He Said.
item.description: SpaceX details are coming out ahead of its expected IPO. Trading in the space stock should start June 12.

item.title: Tesla Wins Over Another Skeptic: JPMorgan Raises TSLA Stock Price Target By More Than 200%
item.description: JPMorgan hiked its price target for Tesla to $475 from $145, while upgrading the stock to ‘Neutral’ from ‘Underweight’.

item.title: J.P. Morgan Turns More Positive on Tesla as Robotics and AI Shape Future Outlook (TSLA)
item.description: J. P. Morgan has upgraded Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) to “neutral” from “underweight”, arguing that the company’s market valuation is becoming increasingly tied to its long-term ambitions in autonomous technology and robotics rather than its near-term financial performance.

item.title: The Bitcoin Crash Just Wiped $62 Billion From Corporate Treasury Holders, Is the MicroStrategy Model Broken?
item.description: The June 2026 crypto rout just erased $62 billion in combined market capitalization from public companies holding Bitcoin as a treasury asset. MicroStrategy, Tesla, and Marathon Digital are leading the damage. The question that matters now is not whether the losses are recoverable; it is whether ...

item.title: Market Chatter: SpaceX Informs Banks It Will Keep IPO Price at $135 Per Share
item.description: SpaceX has informed banks in its planned $75 billion initial public offering that it won't change th

item.title: Can Tesla Bulls Strike Gold Twice? SpaceX IPO Puts The Elon Musk Premium To The Test
item.description: Fidelity says SpaceX has reserved up to 30% of the IPO for retail investors, well above the typical 5%-10% allocation.

item.title: Why Is Jamie Dimon Giving the SpaceX IPO the Hard Sell?
item.description: The JPMorgan CEO is headlining the IPO roadshow.

item.title: Musk Leaves Investors Starstruck at Dimon’s SpaceX Extravaganza
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- Elon Musk can still enchant investors with his vision of the future.Most Read from BloombergSpaceX, Other Mega IPOs Denied Fast Index Entry by S&PSaylor’s Bitcoin Machine Is Misfiring on Every CylinderGlazer Family Members Study Manchester United Stake Sale‘Sell Indonesia’ Sweeps T...

item.title: All model Y trims get black headliner and 16 inch displays
item.description: Small note that standard model Y display is not 1440p even though it is larger. submitted by /u/shinbet [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla erases the past, CAT electrifies the future, and EV tech training TODAY
item.description: On today’s time-traveling episode of Quick Charge , Tesla might be trying to erase evidence of FSD fraud, Caterpillar keeps trying to electrify the construction space, and time is rapidly running out on what’s left of the 30% home solar tax credit. more…

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi Expansion And Global Sales Rebound Test Long Term Thesis
item.description: Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA) has expanded its unsupervised robotaxi service to cover the entire Austin metropolitan area. The company reports a rebound in vehicle sales, with higher registrations in Europe, Japan, and China for May compared with prior months. These updates arrive alongside earlier repor...

item.title: Wall Street Sees SpaceX’s AI Revenue 100 Times Higher by 2030
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- Research analysts across Wall Street are telling would-be SpaceX IPO buyers that they’re modeling for the company’s artificial intelligence division to see 100 times revenue growth at the end of the decade, to help justify a targeted $1.8 trillion valuation.Most Read from Bloomberg...

item.title: SpaceX and Anthropic: The Most Exciting IPOs Ever?
item.description: SpaceX and Anthropic reflect some of the most exciting debuts we've seen in years. But will they live up to the hype?

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Stock Sinks As Market Gains: What You Should Know
item.description: In the closing of the recent trading day, Tesla (TSLA) stood at $418.45, denoting a -1.24% move from the preceding trading day.

item.title: The Cadillac Lyriq costs $200 more for 2027, but it gains a key new feature
item.description: What’s another $200? Prices for the 2027 Cadillac Lyriq increase by just $200 for the 2027 model year, but it will likely be worth it. more…

item.title: Tesla’s Robo-Taxis Are Finally Driving Themselves—but Not the Stock
item.description: Broadcom’s results were weighing on Tesla shares. If one AI company stubs its toe, other AI companies will say “ow.”

item.title: SpaceX IPO: rockets, AI losses and Musk in control
item.description: SpaceX is inviting investors to bet on Elon Musk's vision of AI data centers in space and humans on Mars.The sky-high valuation for SpaceX -- nearly $1.8 trillion -- is based on the idea that his legendary run will continue and that Musk can achieve his goal of data centers in space and putting p...

item.title: Tesla has its answer to auto growth, it just has to bring it to the U.S.: analyst
item.description: Tesla has its answer to grow its automotive sales over the next few years, TD Cowen analyst Itay Michaeli says, but it just has to bring it to the U.S. On Thursday, Michaeli reiterated his $490 price target and the ‘Buy’ rating he already held on Tesla stock ( NASDAQ: TSLA ). However, its automot...

item.title: As Global Markets Reach Historic Heights, a Distinguished Opportunity Emerges in Elektros INC. Lithium Mining, Rare Earth Minerals, and EV Patent Technology for a New Era of Growth
item.description: Elektros Inc. • Publicly Traded • Ticker Symbol: ELEK Industry Perspective "Lithium batteries are the new oil." - Elon Musk, Tesla CEO (publicly reported statement regarding the strategic importance of battery materials). "Lithium, nickel, ...

item.title: 5 'Boring' Stocks That Crushed the Nasdaq-100 Over Past 5 Years
item.description: Over the past five years, the tech-heavy Nasdaq-100 returned roughly 125%, well ahead of the S&P 500. Even casual investors are likely familiar with the most popular stocks in that index, such as Nvidia, Microsoft and Tesla. But would you believe that there are a number of “boring,” large-cap ...

item.title: SpaceX IPO: The Devil Is in the Details
item.description: This is tool banks such as Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley use to build an order book for the SpaceX IPO.

item.title: Tesla Hardware 3 owners could be made whole this month
item.description: Tesla Hardware 3 owners are set to get a new Full Self-Driving version this month as the company plans to release what it is referring to as v14 Lite. The rollout is not yet confirmed for June, but Tesla executives have stated on several occasions that this more refined FSD iteration will work wi...

item.title: Goldman Sachs Predicts SpaceX Revenue Will Surge 100X By 2030
item.description: The pitch behind the largest U.S. stock market debut in history rests on one number, and it asks investors to suspend a lot of disbelief. Goldman Sachs (NYSE:GS), the lead underwriter on the deal, told a potential IPO investor it expects SpaceX’s AI division revenue to climb roughly 100 times by ...

item.title: Waymo’s spent robotaxi batteries will be used as grid storage
item.description: The company announced a deal with B2U Storage Solutions to repurpose the battery packs as Waymo pulls them off the road.

item.title: Tesla extends Austin robotaxi coverage amid FSD push
item.description: The US EV maker announced the expansion through its official robotaxi account on X.

item.title: Buy, Hold, or Sell: Is Tesla Stock a Sell Above $400?
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) at $423.70 looks expensive, because the price embeds AI and robotics promises the business has not yet delivered. With the stock back above $400 after a 7.95% one-month rebound, the valuation gap between hype and earnings dominates. Tesla remains the world’s most valuable auto...

item.title: Tesla Stock Falls. Blame Broadcom.
item.description: Broadcom’s results were weighing on Tesla shares. If one AI company stubs its toe, other AI companies will say “ow.”

item.title: SpaceX Files $75 Billion IPO at Nearly $1.8 Trillion Valuation
item.description: SpaceX plans a June listing with 555.6 million shares priced at $135 each.
